NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout6_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout6_5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_19_Payout1_1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Bonus symbol.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_20_Payout1_2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4, 5 and 6 only.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: Any Wild symbol that appears on the top reels will duplicate itself in the bottom reels but on the opposite side of the center line.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: Any Wild symbol that appears on the bottom reels will duplicate itself in the top reels but on the opposite side of the center line.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: At the start of any main game spin, the win multiplier is x1.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: During any spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1 .
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_1_Payout4_1: 3 or more Bonus symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Bonus Feature.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: During the Bonus Feature, only Prize Multiplier symbols, Shuriken symbols and Kunai symbols will appear on the reels.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_3_Payout4_3: At the start of the Bonus Feature, all Bonus symbols on the reels are transformed into Prize Multiplier symbols and will reveal a bet multiplication from 1x to 3x.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_4_Payout4_4: At the start of the Bonus Feature, 3 bonus spins are awarded and every new Prize Multiplier symbol, Shuriken symbol and Kunai symbol will reset the bonus spin counter back to 3.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_5_Payout4_5: Prize Multiplier symbol is shown as a bet multiplication ranging from 1x to 3x.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_6_Payout4_6: Once there are Prize Multiplier symbols on both top reels and bottom reels respectively and both symbols are positioned on the opposite side of the center line, both symbols will be transformed into Increasing Prize Multiplier symbol and will increase 1x on every Bonus Spin.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_7_Payout4_7: When one or more Shuriken symbol appear, each Shuriken symbol will absorb all the Prize Multiplier symbols' values on the reels and then transform into a Prize Multiplier symbol.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_8_Payout4_8: When one or more Kunai symbol appear, each Kunai symbol will add 1x to all Prize Multiplier symbols on the reels and then transform into a Prize Multiplier symbol with 1x.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_9_Payout4_9: The Bonus Feature ends when the bonus spin counter reaches zero.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule5_1_Payout5_1: The maximum win amount is %{2500}x of the bet amount.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule5_2_Payout5_2: If the total win in the main game or the Bonus Feature reaches %{2500}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

NinjaRaccoonFrenzyRule.Rule1_1: Ninja Raccoon Frenzy is a double 6-reel, 3-row video slot featuring duplicating Wild symbols and bonus feature with increasing prize amount.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{1458} ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
NinjaRaccoonFrenzyRule.Rule1_21: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
